title: aurinocidium robustissimum
side_effects: Aurinocidium robustissimum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, vomiting, and dizziness in some individuals due to its toxic alkaloid content. Prolonged exposure to its extracts has also been linked to liver damage and kidney strain, particularly in people with pre-existing medical conditions. Furthermore, improper use of the plant can lead to an imbalance of electrolytes in the body, resulting in symptoms such as muscle weakness and irregular heartbeats. In severe cases, overconsumption of Aurinocidium robustissimum can even cause respiratory failure and coma.
